_meta.honesty: Stateside is not affiliated with any site listed. No paid placement.

start_here.name: UC Berkeley Off-Campus Housing
start_here.why: The university's own off-campus service combines rental listings with Berkeley-specific housing guidance.
start_here.watch_for: Listings and availability still need independent verification. University affiliation does not guarantee that every listing will fit your dates, budget, or qualification situation.

also_try.name: Berkeley Student Cooperative
also_try.why: Student cooperative housing can offer community-oriented options and a different cost structure from private studios.
also_try.watch_for: Eligibility, room type, shared responsibilities, meal arrangements, and application timelines vary by property.

also_try.name: Craigslist — East Bay apartments
also_try.why: Useful for finding independent landlords and smaller properties that may not appear on larger rental platforms.
also_try.watch_for: Posts are not university-vetted. Confirm the exact unit, landlord authority, fees, and lease before sharing documents or paying.

also_try.name: Zillow — Berkeley rentals
also_try.why: Useful for scanning professionally managed and independently listed rentals with map and price filters.
also_try.watch_for: Availability, fees, qualification rules, and total move-in costs may be incomplete or change outside the listing page.

also_try.name: Apartments.com — Berkeley
also_try.why: Useful for comparing larger apartment buildings and seeing common amenities in one place.
also_try.watch_for: Advertised prices may reflect selected units, lease lengths, or promotions. Ask for the complete written cost for your exact dates.

for_international_students.heading: International-student housing resources
for_international_students.note: Start with campus guidance, then ask each landlord which qualification route they will accept before paying an application fee.

resources.name: Berkeley International Office — Finding Housing
resources.what: Campus guidance for international students and scholars looking for housing and avoiding common problems.

resources.name: UC Berkeley Off-Campus Housing guidance
resources.what: University information about off-campus rental services and resources for living around Berkeley.

resources.name: International House Berkeley
resources.what: A campus-adjacent residential community with its own application process and policies.

documents_to_prepare: Passport or other identification, shared only through a verified application process
UC Berkeley admission or enrollment documentation
Proof of available funds, such as bank statements
Sponsor letter if housing will be parent-funded
Written questions about credit, SSN, guarantor, and alternative qualification requirements
